title: buildah fail to make oci image from checkpoint tar file. `Error: reading build container "working-container-3": container not known`
body:
I want make oci image from a checkpoint tar file but `buildah` can't recognize the container name that I build using `buildah from scratch` 

here are the logs - 
```➜  my-oci-image container=$(buildah from scratch)
➜  my-oci-image mntPath=$(buildah mount $container)
Error: chown /home/parthiba/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs: operation not permitted
WARN[0000] failed to shutdown storage: "chown /home/parthiba/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs: operation not permitted" 
➜  my-oci-image mntPath=$(sudo buildah mount $container)
Error: reading build container "working-container-3": container not known
➜  my-oci-image sudo buildah copy $container /home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar/ /
Error: reading build container "working-container-3": container not known
➜  my-oci-image buildah from --name mycheckpointcontainer
Error: an image name (or "scratch") must be specified
➜  my-oci-image buildah from --name mycheckpointcontainer scratch
mycheckpointcontainer
➜  my-oci-image sudo buildah copy my /home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar/ /
➜  my-oci-image sudo buildah copy mycheckpointcontainer /home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar/ /
Error: reading build container "mycheckpointcontainer": container not known
➜  my-oci-image sudo buildah mount mycheckpointcontainer                                           
Error: reading build container "mycheckpointcontainer": container not known
➜  my-oci-image 
```

comments.body:
First why are you using VFS instead of overlay driver?

What does `buildah containers` show?

I change it to overlay driver but still got the same issues - 
```
➜  checkpoint buildah copy mycheckpointcontainer checkpoint.tar /
Error: adding content to container "mycheckpointcontainer": reading "/home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar": copier: get: "/home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar": opening file for adding its contents to archive: open /home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar: permission denied
➜  checkpoint sudo buildah copy mycheckpointcontainer checkpoint.tar /
Error: reading build container "mycheckpointcontainer": container not known
➜  checkpoint container=$(buildah from scratch)        
➜  checkpoint buildah copy $container checkpoint.tar /
Error: adding content to container "working-container": reading "/home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar": copier: get: "/home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar": opening file for adding its contents to archive: open /home/parthiba/checkpoint/checkpoint.tar: permission denied
➜  checkpoint sudo buildah copy $container checkpoint.tar /
Error: reading build container "working-container": container not known
➜  checkpoint mntPath=$(sudo buildah mount $container)  
Error: reading build container "working-container": container not known
➜  checkpoint mntPath=$(buildah mount $container) 
Error: cannot mount using driver overlay in rootless mode. You need to run it in a `buildah unshare` session
➜  checkpoint buildah containers 
CONTAINER ID  BUILDER  IMAGE ID     IMAGE NAME                       CONTAINER NAME
70b721ba4b82     *                  scratch                          mycheckpointcontainer
ffde28ce1a9d     *                  scratch                          working-container
➜  checkpoint mntPath=$(sudo buildah mount 70b721ba4b82)
Error: reading build container "70b721ba4b82": container not known
```
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
